Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ServiceCloudConsoleConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ServiceCloudConsoleConfig
public class ServiceCloudConsoleConfig extends Object

Java class for ServiceCloudConsoleConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ServiceCloudConsoleConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="componentList" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}AppComponentList" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="detailPageRefreshMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="footerColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="headerColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="keyboardShortcuts" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}KeyboardShortcuts"/>
         <element name="listPlacement" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ListPlacement"/>
         <element name="listRefreshMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="liveAgentConfig" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}LiveAgentConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="primaryTabColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pushNotifications" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}PushNotification" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="tabLimitConfig" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}TabLimitConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="whitelistedDomains" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getPushNotifications

      public List<PushNotification> getPushNotifications()
      Gets the value of the pushNotifications property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the pushNotifications property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getPushNotifications().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list PushNotification

      Returns:
      The value of the pushNotifications property.

    • getTabLimitConfig

      public TabLimitConfig getTabLimitConfig()
      Gets the value of the tabLimitConfig property.
      Returns:
      possible object is TabLimitConfig

    • setTabLimitConfig

      public void setTabLimitConfig(TabLimitConfig value)
      Sets the value of the tabLimitConfig property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is TabLimitConfig

    • getWhitelistedDomains

      public List<String> getWhitelistedDomains()
      Gets the value of the whitelistedDomains property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the whitelistedDomains property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getWhitelistedDomains().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the whitelistedDomains property.
